originalTitle: Spreading Islamist insurgency dominates Benin's presidential campaign
title: Spreading Islamist insurgency dominates Benin's presidential campaign
content: Cross-border raids from militant Islamists are increasingly threatening the West African state's stability.

originalTitle: US has let in 4,499 refugees since October - all but three were South African
title: US has let in 4,499 refugees since October - all but three were South African
content: Trump has given priority to Afrikaners, a white minority group he says is being persecuted. South Africa has objected to his characterisation.

originalTitle: US warns citizens to reconsider Nigeria travel on safety grounds
title: US warns citizens to reconsider Nigeria travel on safety grounds
content: The state department has also authorised non-emergency embassy staff to leave on security grounds.

originalTitle: Djibouti votes as long-time leader seeks sixth presidential term
title: Djibouti votes as long-time leader seeks sixth presidential term
content: Politicians scrapped the presidential age limit last year, allowing Ismail Omar Guelleh to run yet again.

originalTitle: Iran ceasefire: Not an off-ramp for the US but a life-saving ejection seat
title: Iran ceasefire: Not an off-ramp for the US but a life-saving ejection seat
content: A Middle Eastern country has for the first time single-handedly checked the war-making capabilities of the US and Israel

originalTitle: Russia and Ukraine agree to 32-hour Orthodox Easter ceasefire
title: Russia and Ukraine agree to 32-hour Orthodox Easter ceasefire
content: Moscow and Kyiv signal a short Easter truce as diplomacy stalls and war pressures mount.

originalTitle: Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'
title: Trump says Iran's handling of Strait of Hormuz is 'not the agreement we have'
content: The US president accused Iran of "doing a very poor job" with the waterway as Israel and Lebanon to begin peace talks.

originalTitle: Ceasefire or no ceasefire, the Middle East's reshuffling is not yet done
title: Ceasefire or no ceasefire, the Middle East's reshuffling is not yet done
content: Both sides have reason to end the war but share no common ground.

originalTitle: Melania Trump denies ties to Jeffrey Epstein and urges hearing for survivors
title: Melania Trump denies ties to Jeffrey Epstein and urges hearing for survivors
content: She called rumours that Epstein introduced her to Donald Trump "mean-spirited attempts to defame my reputation".

originalTitle: 'Hungry' Watkins is man on mission - but will Tuchel take notice?
title: 'Hungry' Watkins is man on mission - but will Tuchel take notice?
content: Ollie Watkins' response to being dropped by England has been nothing short of emphatic, with two strikes in Bologna adding to his goal against West Ham before the international break.

originalTitle: Egypt goalkeeper banned for striking referee
title: Egypt goalkeeper banned for striking referee
content: Al-Ahly goalkeeper Mohamed El-Shenawy banned for four games for striking a referee on the head following an Egyptian Pro League match.

originalTitle: Robertson to leave Liverpool at end of the season
title: Robertson to leave Liverpool at end of the season
content: Andy Robertson will leave Liverpool at the end of the season when his contract expires in the summer, the club has announced.
